summary: Added a repository check that validates the GitHub pull request template still carries the qd evidence and verification contract from docs/ORCHESTRATION.md, and wired it into just check.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The check validates required PR template headings and fields for node id, acceptance criteria, evidence paths, qd reports, platform validation, residual risks, DAG/topology changes, Linux readiness, macOS validation, and qd evidence/report linkage.
Missing required fields produce file-scoped errors.
just pr-template-check and just check pass.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Changes are limited to repository check tooling, Just wiring, and node evidence/report files.

commandsRun.command: temp-copy negative smoke test proving a missing required field fails

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository check and PR template contract validation only; no product runtime validation is required.
